subject: Update your KYC details
body_content:
Dear User,
                Greetings from Paytm Payments Bank!
                
                  Kindly note that your KYC profile details updated with us are
                  not in line with the bank standards. Kindly click
                  here
                  to update the details.
                
                
                  Important *Please click the link using your
                  mobile phone.
                
              
            
          
          
            
              
                Best regards,
                Paytm Payments Bank Limited
              
              
                Paytm Payments Bank App is now available for download
